title: Tender Sour Almond Peruvian Crumble
description: A midnight-craving peruvian dish featuring sour and tender almond flour, fry with a touch of sweetness to satisfy your diabetic-friendly cravings.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour and sour cream.
Add vanilla extract and maple syrup or agave nectar, mix well until smooth.
Fold in unsalted butter pieces until just combined. It should be crumbly but not dry.
Press mixture into a greased dish.
Mix coarse sugar with a tablespoon of cold water to make syrup-like consistency. Brush over the top of the crumble for a golden finish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
